# Medical365 - Hospital & Clinic Management Software Context

Medical365 is an elite, cloud-based, ABDM-compliant Hospital Information Management System (HIMS) and Electronic Health Record (EHR) platform specifically architected for the Indian healthcare ecosystem. It provides a full-stack digital backbone for clinics, multi-specialty hospitals, and healthcare chains, focusing on operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, and patient care quality.

## Core Modules & Features
- **EMR & EHR Systems**: Comprehensive clinical documentation with specialty-specific templates (Cardiology, Pediatrics, etc.).
- **Revenue Cycle Management (RCM)**: Integrated billing, insurance claims processing, and financial accounting.
- **Telemedicine Platform**: ABDM-integrated virtual consultation with secure video and e-prescriptions.
- **Integrated LIMS**: Laboratory Information Management System for automated pathology and diagnostic workflows.
- **Pharmacy Management**: Inventory tracking, shelf-life management, and integrated retail/in-patient sales.
- **OPD & Queue Management**: Modular tokens, self-service kiosks, and automated patient flow optimization.
- **Bed & In-Patient Management**: Real-time ward tracking, nursing station integration, and OT scheduling.

## Compliance & Security
- **ABDM Integrated**: Certified for M1, M2, and M3 milestones (Health ID, Health Records, Facility Registry).
- **DPDP Act 2023**: Fully compliant with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act for health data sovereignty.
- **EHR Standards**: Adheres to the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (MoHFW) EHR Standards for India.
- **ISO 27001 Certified**: Adheres to international standards for information security management systems.
- **Data Residency**: All sensitive patient data is stored locally in secure Indian data centers.

## Operational Impact (ROI Metrics)
- **Revenue Acceleration**: 40% faster revenue realization through automated RCM and billing cycles.
- **Patient Flow**: 30% reduction in patient wait times via smart queue and token management.
- **Security Reliability**: Zero data breach record; fully audited for DPDP Act 2023 & ISO 27001.
- **Deployment Velocity**: Rapid go-live in 2-4 weeks with specialized local training teams.

## Service Areas
- **Primary Focus**: Rajasthan, India.
- **Cities Active**: Jaipur, Jodhpur, Udaipur, Kota, Ajmer, Bikaner, Sikar, Alwar, Bhilwara, Pali, Bharatpur, Sri Ganganagar.
- **Global Availability**: Available as a SaaS solution for healthcare providers across India.
